imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern geometric drone wireframe hero illustration on a dark neutral background (drone-hero.dim_1600x900.png)
- Minimal monoline drone logo mark (drone-logo.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive single-page website for designing drones, with clear navigation between a landing page and a drone design workspace.
Implement Internet Identity sign-in and show signed-in state in the UI so users can save and load their drone designs under their identity.

Provide a drone design editor that lets users configure a drone by selecting common components (at minimum: frame size/type, motor, propeller, battery, flight controller, camera/optional payload) and adjusting key parameters (e.g., quantity, KV, prop size, battery cell count).

Render a live 3D preview of the configured drone in the workspace using Three.js / React Three Fiber, with basic orbit controls and clear visual differentiation between major parts (frame, motors, props, battery, camera/payload).

Calculate and display a simple design summary for the current configuration (at minimum: estimated all-up weight, estimated total thrust, thrust-to-weight ratio, and an estimated flight time range) using transparent, user-visible assumptions.
Add a “My Designs” panel in the UI that integrates with the backend (via React Query) to save the current design, view saved designs, load a design into the editor, rename it, and delete it.
Provide a coherent visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) appropriate for a drone design tool and apply it consistently across all pages.
Add static generated brand/hero imagery and use it on the landing page and in the app shell (e.g., header) without serving images through the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a website for designing drones
Implement backend persistence for drone designs: create, list, load, update, and delete designs per authenticated user, including timestamps and a user-provided name for each design.
